project: This game contains horror elements and jumpscares!
Play the main story. Your progress will save.
See how long you can survive unlimited waves!
Choose a level to play in the main story.
Endless starts at level 3, and continues forever!
Made in one week for Major Jam 7
Made in one week for Major Jam 7
